summary: Add WSL doctor, repo launcher, and stack compatibility contract
description: Add WSL doctor, repo launcher, and stack compatibility contract
acceptance: go doctor reports WSL/Linux prerequisites, agent availability, stack/template compatibility, and actionable failures as JSON
A project-local launcher discovers or bootstraps the stack and runs go commands without hard-coded machine paths
Template declares a required stack version and incompatible runtimes fail before autonomous execution

evidence.summary: RED proved doctor and launcher absent and future stack requirements ignored; GREEN adds v0.2.0 compatibility gating, WSL/Hermes doctor, portable ./go launcher for template and generated projects, 44 tests, and paired template checks.
